strengths: Built ETL pipelines and time-series models
weaknesses: Snowflake/BigQuery listed but limited usage detail
Only ~2 years specified in analytics roles
improvement_bullets: Created time series models to forecast customer demand, effectively predicting trends that informed revenue forecasting and strategic marketing spend.
Utilized Snowflake and BigQuery to architect scalable cloud data warehouses, streamlining cross-functional access to real-time performance metrics.
Built and maintained complex financial forecast models using Excel and Python to simulate KPI outcomes and support executive-level strategic decision-making.
Led internal workshops and provided mentorship to junior team members on SQL best practices and data visualization standards, fostering a data-driven culture.
Leveraged Snowflake to integrate disparate data sources, enabling more accurate revenue tracking and granular modeling of high-value player behavior.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Commercial Analyst - Casino opportunity with FanDuel. I am interested in this opportunity because of FanDuel's position as the premier mobile gaming company and my passion for using complex data to drive business performance in fast-paced markets. What interests me about working for FanDuel is its dynamic approach to iGaming and sports wagering; the company's commitment to innovation and its 'One Team' culture excites me because it mirrors the collaborative environments where I have thrived throughout my career. I believe my expertise in advanced financial modeling and my proficiency in building automated data pipelines would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating raw, ambiguous data into clear, actionable business insights. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for better KPI visibility and built interactive Power BI dashboards that processed operational data, resulting in a 40% reduction in reporting time. This allowed leadership to make data-backed decisions 25% faster, directly impacting our bottom line. Ultimately, I know that the Commercial Analyst - Casino role at FanDuel would allow me to bring my quantitative modeling skills to support revenue forecasting and business performance tracking. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my mentoring and cross-functional collaboration skills. I regularly guided team members on dashboard utilization and automated workflows, reducing onboarding time by 50% and ensuring data consistency across the organization. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in SQL and time-series analysis in working on the FanDuel Casino team. I know that my technical modeling skills and my track record of delivering actionable business insights align with what it takes to succeed at the Commercial Analyst - Casino role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
